items.title: codeburn
items.description: See where your AI coding tokens go. Interactive TUI dashboard for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor cost observability.
items.summary: CodeBurn is an open-source tool for tracking AI coding token costs for services like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor. It features an interactive TUI dashboard. It's available on GitHub.

items.title: browser-harness
items.description: Self-healing browser harness that enables LLMs to complete any task.
items.summary: A self-healing browser harness allows large language models to complete any browser task without restrictions. It is built on CDP and offers complete freedom for LLMs. It is a minimal, efficient solution for browser automation.

items.title: anything-analyzer
items.description: 全能协议分析工具：浏览器抓包 + MITM 代理 + 指纹伪装 + AI 分析 + MCP Server 无缝对接 AI Agent/IDE   |  All-in-one protocol analysis toolkit — built-in browser capture, MITM proxy, JS hooks, fingerprint spoofing, AI analysis & MCP server for agent integration
items.summary: Anything-Analyzer is an all-in-one protocol analysis toolkit featuring browser capture, MITM proxy, fingerprint spoofing, AI analysis, and seamless MCP server integration. It was developed by Mouseww and is actively maintained. As of 2026, it has over 1,200 stars on GitHub.

items.title: design-extract
items.description: Extract any website's complete design system with one command. DTCG tokens, semantic+primitive+composite, MCP server for Claude Code/Cursor/Windsurf, multi-platform emitters (iOS SwiftUI, Android Compose, Flutter, WordPress), Tailwind v4, Figma variables, shadcn/ui, CSS health audit, WCAG remediation, Chrome extension. MIT, Playwright, Node 20+.
items.summary: Design-extract tool extracts any website's complete design system with one command. It supports DTCG tokens and multi-platform emitters like iOS SwiftUI, Android Compose, Flutter, and WordPress. It also integrates with Tailwind v4 and Figma variables.

items.title: BuilderPulse
items.description: AI-powered daily intelligence for indie hackers and builders. 20 questions, 10+ sources, every morning.
items.summary: BuilderPulse provides daily AI-driven intelligence for indie hackers, sourced from over 10 platforms. It is open-source and hosted on GitHub. The project has 292 stars and 104 watchers.

items.title: weft
items.description: A programming language for AI systems
items.summary: Weft is a programming language designed for AI systems, integrating LLMs, humans, and APIs as first-class components. It features both code and graph views for efficient development. The compiler ensures correct connections and logic.

items.title: GEOFlow
items.description: Open-source GEO content production system with AI tasks, review workflow, and publishing.
items.summary: GEOFlow is an open-source content production system using AI for article generation, review, and publishing. It includes an AI engine, task management, and a review workflow. It is released under the Apache License 2.0.

items.title: OpenMythos
items.description: A theoretical reconstruction of the Claude Mythos architecture, built from first principles using the available research literature.
items.summary: The Mythos model by Anthropic is a highly advanced AI architecture known for its exceptional capabilities in computer security and hacking tasks, raising significant concerns among finance ministers and top bankers.

items.title: agentic-stack
items.description: One brain, many harnesses. Portable .agent/ folder (memory + skills + protocols) that plugs into Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Hermes, or DIY Python — and keeps its knowledge when you switch.
items.summary: Agentic-Stack is a portable.agent/ folder with memory, skills, and protocols that connects to various coding tools like OpenClaw and DIY Python, maintaining knowledge across switches.

items.title: llm-internals
items.description: Learn LLM internals step by step - from tokenization to attention to inference optimization.
items.summary: LLM internals involve tokenization, attention mechanisms, and optimization for inference. Key components include feed-forward networks and Flash Attention. MoE architecture enhances speed and efficiency.

items.title: awesome-gpt-image-2-prompts
items.description: Curated GPT-Image-2 prompts and image examples across portraits, posters, UI mockups, character sheets, and community experiments.
items.summary: Curated GPT-Image-2 prompts include urban night portraits and character designs. Examples are from websites and GitHub repositories. The prompts are used for various creative applications.

items.title: design-md-chrome
items.description: Chrome extension to extract styles from any website and generate DESIGN.md files and design skills for AI based on TypeUI
items.summary: The Chrome extension DESIGN.md Style Extractor extracts website styles and generates DESIGN.md files for AI-based development. It's compatible with tools like Claude Code and Google Stitch. Available on the Chrome Web Store.

items.title: obscura
items.description: The headless browser for AI agents and web scraping
items.summary: Obscura is an open-source headless browser engine for AI agents and web scraping, written in Rust, and compatible with Puppeteer and Playwright. It runs JavaScript via V8 and offers anti-detection features. It is faster than headless Chrome.

items.title: Freebuff2API
items.description: 🚀 OpenAI-compatible Freebuff proxy with dynamic free-agent tracking, token rotation, and ready-to-use Docker deployment.
items.summary: The Freebuff2API is an open-source proxy server for LLM APIs with automatic API key rotation and usage tracking. It supports multiple AI providers and can be deployed using Docker. The proxy converts between different API formats automatically.

items.title: ai-influence-digest
items.description: Turn X scrolling into an AI-powered weekly digest — no X API, no scraping, just your browser. Scans 65+ AI builders, filters actionable content, exports a poster. Built for  content creators.
items.summary: AI-Influence Digest converts browser activity into a weekly digest without API or scraping, focusing on actionable AI insights for creators. It covers 65+ AI builders and features community-driven content. The service aims to streamline AI information for effective use.

items.title: agentic-video-editor
items.description: AI-powered video editor that turns raw footage and a creative brief into a polished ad using an ensemble of AI agents (Google Gemini + FFmpeg)
items.summary: Agentic-video-editor uses Gemini and FFmpeg to automate video editing, transforming raw footage into polished ads. Avid and Google Cloud partnered to integrate this AI into professional editing tools. This technology significantly reduces editing time.

items.title: cangjie-skill
items.description: 把一本书蒸馏成一组可执行的 Agent Skills
items.summary: Cangjie-skill converts books into AI-executable skills, distilling knowledge into actionable frameworks. It uses AI to extract, verify, and structure knowledge into skills. Users can leverage these skills for practical applications.

items.title: inside-lago-voice-skill
items.description: A framework for teaching AI to write like you. Not like a better version of you. Like you.
items.summary: Inside-Lago-Voice-Skill trains AI to mimic your unique writing style by analyzing your content. It focuses on specific examples to capture your voice, not a generic version. This method ensures AI writes authentically like you.

items.title: tradclaw
items.description: AI openclaw mom and household manager for agentic parenting
items.summary: Tradclaw is an open-source AI for household management, designed for agentic parenting. It uses OpenClaw primitives and includes a scaffold for setup. It's hosted on GitHub.

items.title: AutoProber
items.description: Hardware hacker’s flying probe automation stack for agent-driven   target discovery, microscope mapping, safety-monitored CNC motion, probe review, and   controlled pin probing.
items.summary: AutoProber is an open-source hardware hacking tool using AI for automated target discovery, microscope mapping, and safe CNC probing. It features a probe arm and web dashboard for control. It's designed for precise, safe hardware analysis.

items.title: crypto-kol-quant
items.description: 首个将99位加密KOL交易经验LLM蒸馏为可回测量化因子的开源项目 | First to distill 99 crypto KOL trading experience into backtestable quant factors via LLM
items.summary: The project 0xquqi/crypto-kol-quant distills 99 crypto KOL trading experiences into 87 backtestable quant factors using LLM. It is the first open-source initiative of its kind. Current date is 2026-04-19.

items.title: cc-design
items.description: High-fidelity HTML design and prototype guidance skill for AI agents
items.summary: CC-design is a skill for AI agents that offers high-fidelity HTML design and prototype creation. It includes capabilities for interactive elements and slide decks. The skill is based on comprehensive design knowledge.

items.title: karpathy-llm-wiki-vault
items.summary: Karpathy's LLM Knowledge Bases concept involves using large language models to convert documents into structured wikis. A Reddit plugin called LLM Wiki implements this idea for Obsidian users. Rowboat extends Karpathy's idea into a work context.

items.title: LLM-anonymization
items.description: Reverse proxy for Claude Code that anonymizes sensitive pentest data (IPs, hashes, credentials, hostnames,     PII) before it reaches Anthropic. Dual-layer detection: local Ollama LLM + regex safety net, with     per-engagement vault and self-improving feedback loop.
items.summary: An anonymization reverse proxy anonymizes sensitive pentest data before it reaches Anthropic, using a local LLM and regex for dual-layer detection. It features a per-engagement vault and a self-improving feedback loop.

items.title: wiki-os
items.description: UI Layer for Karpathy's LLM Wiki
items.summary: The UI layer for Karpathy's LLM Wiki is WikiOS, which turns an Obsidian vault into a local web app. It uses Fastify server and SQLite for indexing. WikiOS allows customization of the "People" concept.

items.title: nano-analyzer
items.description: A minimal LLM-powered zero-day vulnerability scanner by AISLE.
items.summary: Nano-analyzer is a minimal, LLM-powered zero-day vulnerability scanner developed by AISLE. It uses a two-stage pipeline for security analysis. The tool is hosted on GitHub.

items.title: AI-Animation-Skill
items.description: 使用 AI 生成 HTML 演示动画的工具集，让视频创作者能够快速将科普文本转换为炫酷的演示动画。
items.summary: AI-Animation-Skill is a toolset that uses AI to quickly convert educational text into impressive demo animations. Mango AI is a notable AI animation generator that turns text into animated videos with talking avatars. Simplified offers an AI-driven platform for creating engaging animations from text.

items.title: flow-llm-router
items.description: The Ultimate "Token Saver"
items.summary: Flow-LLM-Router optimizes LLM costs by selecting the most cost-effective models based on request complexity. It reduces token spend and improves performance. It integrates multiple providers for balanced cost and quality.

items.title: Claude-Design-By-Anthropic
items.description: Download Free Claude Desktop - Designed by Anthropic is a beautiful and free desktop application for Claude AI. Enjoy fast chatting, advanced coding, writing assistance, and a modern elegant interface optimized for Windows users.
items.summary: Download the free Claude Desktop app by Anthropic for fast chatting, coding, and writing assistance. It's available at https://claude.com/download. No paid plan required.

items.title: WorldSeed
items.description: A world engine where AI agents live autonomously — physical rules, information asymmetry, any agent can plug in. Define scenarios in YAML, watch stories emerge.
items.summary: WorldSeed is a platform where AI agents can autonomously live in a world defined by YAML, experiencing physical rules and information asymmetry. Any agent can join, creating emergent stories.

items.title: agents-md
items.description: Drop-in AGENTS.md that makes every coding agent behave like a senior engineer instead of an eager intern. Kills sycophancy, stops drive-by refactors, forces verification loops. Synthesizes Karpathy's four principles and Boris Cherny's Claude Code workflow. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and the open standard.
items.summary: Agents-md transforms coding agents to act like senior engineers, eliminates sycophancy, and enforces verification loops. It integrates Karpathy's principles and Boris Cherny's Claude Code workflow. Compatible with various tools and standards.

items.title: awesome-ai-reverse
items.description: ai reverse 一把梭
items.summary: The repository "awesome-ai-reverse" on GitHub compiles tools for AI-assisted reverse engineering, including model context protocols and binary analysis. It is maintained by darbra and updated regularly. The project aims to enhance efficiency in JavaScript and binary reverse engineering using AI models.

items.title: AIInfraGuide
items.description: AI Infra 全栈从0入门学习资料：https://caomaolufei.github.io/AIInfraGuide/
items.summary: AI Infra 全栈从0入门学习资料提供了全面的AI基础设施学习路线，涵盖基础知识到高级技术，帮助从业者系统化学习。核心内容包括模型和架构，旨在提升技术能力。

items.title: claude-code-java
items.description: claude-code-java 是一个可嵌入任何 Java 应用的 AI Agent 引擎。claude-code-java is an embeddable AI Agent engine for Java applications.
items.summary: Claude Code is an AI programming assistant for Java applications, enhancing code generation and debugging. It integrates seamlessly and offers advanced features like remote collaboration and skill management. Its latest update in 2026 improved agent capabilities and security.

items.title: SkVM
items.description: The Language Virtual Machine for Agent Skills
items.summary: SkVM is a system that compiles and optimizes agent skills for use across different large language models, ensuring they work efficiently regardless of the model used. It uses ahead-of-time compilation and runtime optimization to adapt skills to new models.

items.title: Lossless-Scaling-FPS-Upscale-PC
items.description: Lossless Scaling is a powerful Windows tool for lossless upscaling and AI frame generation. Optimize FPS with LSFG, enjoy crisp integer scaling, and improve image quality in any game or app. Perfect for retro games, emulators, and modern titles on 1440p, 4K, and ultrawide monitors.
items.summary: Lossless Scaling enhances image quality and frame rate in games, offering lossless upscaling and AI frame generation. It works on various resolutions and is compatible with many applications. It's a powerful tool for improving gaming performance and visual quality.

items.title: USB-Uncensored-LLM
items.description: The ultimate zero-install, portable local AI environment. Run high-quality, uncensored LLMs (Gemma, Qwen, NemoMix) directly from any USB drive or SSD. Fully air-gapped, cross-platform (Win/Mac/Linux), and privacy-first with persistent chat history.
items.summary: USB-Uncensored-LLM offers a portable, local AI environment that runs high-quality models directly from a USB drive without installation. It's cross-platform and maintains privacy with no data leaving the drive.

items.title: Web3Hermes
items.description: 【Hermes WebUI】Hermes-Agent 中文版 WebUI，便于中国用户使用
items.summary: Hermes-Agent 中文版 WebUI 提供了便捷的使用界面，适合中国用户。它支持本地部署和免费微信对接。详细部署指南在 https://www.freedidi.com/23749.html。

items.title: AirTrain
items.description: Distributed ML training across Apple Silicon Macs
items.summary: AirTrain enables distributed machine learning training across multiple Apple Silicon Macs using Wi-Fi, significantly reducing training costs and bandwidth. It leverages the DiLoCo algorithm and Apple's MLX framework. It syncs gradients every 500 steps instead of every step.

items.title: open-carrusel
items.description: AI-powered Instagram carousel builder. Chat with Claude to design slides; export as PNGs at exact Instagram dimensions. Type /start in Claude Code to bootstrap.
items.summary: Open-Carrusel is an AI-powered Instagram carousel builder. Use /start in Claude Code to create slides and export them as PNGs at Instagram dimensions. It's free to use.

items.title: ddtree-mlx
items.description: Tree-based speculative decoding for Apple Silicon (MLX). ~10-15% faster than DFlash on code, ~1.5x over autoregressive. First MLX port with custom Metal kernels for hybrid model support.
items.summary: ddtree-mlx is a faster MLX implementation for Apple Silicon, achieving up to 15% better performance than DFlash and 1.5x over autoregressive decoding. It uses custom Metal kernels for hybrid model support.

items.title: sightflow-desktop-agent
items.summary: SightFlow Desktop Agent is a vision-driven universal IM agent framework for automating tasks using computer vision. It mimics human interactions to avoid bans and integrates with platforms like WeChat and WhatsApp. It is available on GitHub for cloning and use.

items.title: runline
items.description: ⚡ Code mode for agents
items.summary: Runline is a code mode for agents with 188 integrations and 2410 actions. It uses JavaScript and is available on GitHub. It supports various APIs for different services.

items.title: agentscript
items.description: An open, schema-driven language for configuring agent orchestration systems
items.summary: Agent Script is an open, schema-driven language for configuring agent orchestration systems, allowing precise control over AI agents and blending deterministic rules with agentic reasoning. It was developed for Agentforce but is applicable to general agents. It uses a clean, YAML-like syntax for defining conversational agents and their actions.

items.title: OmniAgent
items.description: An agent capable of self-evolving and dynamically hardening security
items.summary: OmniAgents are advanced AI systems that can self-evolve and dynamically enhance their security through continual learning and adaptation. They operate in a closed-loop system, improving themselves over time. These agents are designed to tackle complex, dynamic problems.

items.title: my-ai-workflow
items.summary: The AI-assisted workflow involves dynamic, runtime-extendable processes with human checkpoints. It uses a custom-built engine called Grael for AI agent pipelines. The workflow can add new steps based on discoveries.

items.title: agent-browser-mcp
items.description: 让 Agent 直接操作真实 Chrome 的 MCP 服务，支持页面扫描、CDP、截图与物理输入
items.summary: Agent-browser-mcp allows AI agents to control real Chrome browsers directly, supports page scanning, CDP, screenshots, and physical input. It runs as a Chrome extension, bypassing most anti-bot detections.

items.title: sqz
items.description: Compress LLM context to save tokens and reduce costs
items.summary: Context compression tools like sqz-mcp reduce LLM token costs by compressing input data before it reaches the model. This method can cut costs significantly, especially for high-context models. sqz-cli is a Rust-based utility for this purpose.

items.title: friday-showcase
items.description: Friday — A 24/7 AI Assistant Built Entirely on Claude Code
items.summary: Friday is a 24/7 AI assistant built entirely on Claude Code, with no custom backend or fine-tuned models. It autonomously manages its own configuration and memory. The system runs on a single Flask + SQLite server.

items.title: tokenjuice
items.description: 🧃 Token weight loss. Lean output compaction for terminal-heavy agent workflows. Works as a native CLI tool or as an extension to popular coding and agent frameworks.
items.summary: Tokenjuice is a CLI tool for optimizing token usage in AI coding workflows, offering lean output compaction for terminal-heavy agents. It works natively or as an extension to coding frameworks. It's open-source and built in Rust.
